title: Veerbhadra Temple
tagline: Veerbhadra Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Veerbhadra Temple, is in Chikodi Taluka of Belagavi District, Karnataka, India, approximately 94km (58mi) from Belgaum.
overview.description: Veerbhadra Temple, is in Chikodi Taluka of Belagavi District, Karnataka, India, approximately 94km (58mi) from Belgaum. It lies on the banks of the Krishna River.

topPlaces.name: Dudhaganga
topPlaces.description: The Dudhaganga (or Dudhganga, Doodhganga) is a right-bank tributary river of the Krishna in western India. It rises in Kolhapur district of Maharashtra in the Western Ghats and flows eastward through the Kolhapur and Belgaum districts in Karnataka before joining the Krishna.

topPlaces.name: Kopeshwar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kopeshwar Temple is at Khidrapur, Kolhapur district, Maharashtra. It is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Panchganga River
topPlaces.description: The Panchganga River is one of the important rivers of India located in Maharashtra. In English, the name translates as "Five Rivers".

topPlaces.name: Diggewadi
topPlaces.description: Diggewadi is a village in Raybag taluk in Belgaum Panchayat in the southern state of Karnataka, India. The official language of Diggewadi is Kannada.

items.note: The Dudhaganga (or Dudhganga, Doodhganga) is a right-bank tributary river of the Krishna in western India. It rises in Kolhapur district of Maharashtra in the Western Ghats and flows eastward through the Kolhapur and Belgaum districts in Karnataka before joining the Krishna.
Kopeshwar Temple is at Khidrapur, Kolhapur district, Maharashtra. It is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva.
The Panchganga River is one of the important rivers of India located in Maharashtra. In English, the name translates as "Five Rivers".
Diggewadi is a village in Raybag taluk in Belgaum Panchayat in the southern state of Karnataka, India. The official language of Diggewadi is Kannada.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Veerbhadra Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Veerbhadra Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Veerbhadra Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (145 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Veerbhadra Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Veerbhadra Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Veerbhadra Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Veerbhadra Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Veerbhadra Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dudhaganga, Kopeshwar Temple, Panchganga River, Diggewadi.
